title: Shakespeare's Globe: A Midsummer Night's Dream
original_title: A Midsummer Night's Dream - Live at Shakespeare's Globe
overview: On a Midsummer’s night, four young lovers find themselves wrapped in the dream-like arms of an enchanted forest where sprites lurk and fairies rule.
